notable_completed.title: Contact Router Data Integrity Fixes. (1) Raw SQL in getTimeline has no tenant filter and .catch(() => []) swallows errors (R-09). (2) sortBy accepts arbitrary strings — enum whitelist needed (R-10). (3) filterOptions ignores status input (R-12). (4) contactListResponseSchema uses 'data' key but router returns 'contacts' (D-03). (5) phone non-nullable in response schema but mapper returns null (D-08/R-14). Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §15,§18.
notable_completed.description: Contact Router Data Integrity Fixes. (1) Raw SQL in getTimeline has no tenant filter and .catch(() => []) swallows errors (R-09). tasks.title: Lead Router Security - Tenant Isolation & Domain Bypass. Fix 4 CRITICAL/MEDIUM security issues: (1) scoreWithAI fire-and-forget uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant - cross-tenant data leak risk [S2]. (2) logActivity $transaction uses raw ctx.prisma - may bypass tenant middleware [S3]. (3) bulkUpdateStatus uses direct Prisma updateMany bypassing Lead.changeStatus() domain validation - skips status transition rules and domain events [S4]. (4) getHotLeads/getReadyForQualification pass userId as ownerId without explicit tenantId [S9]. Fix: Replace ctx.prisma with prismaWithTenant in all cases. Route bulkUpdateStatus through domain model. Add explicit tenantId to hot/ready queries.
tasks.description: Lead Router Security - Tenant Isolation & Domain Bypass. (2) logActivity $transaction uses raw ctx.prisma - may bypass tenant middleware [S3]. (3) bulkUpdateStatus uses direct Prisma updateMany bypassing Lead.changeStatus() domain validation - skips status transition rules and domain events [S4]. (4) getHotLeads/getReadyForQualification pass userId as ownerId without explicit tenantId [S9]. Fix: Replace ctx.prisma with prismaWithTenant in all cases. Route bulkUpdateStatus through domain model. Add explicit tenantId to hot/ready queries.

tasks.title: Lead Router Data Integrity Fixes. Fix 5 HIGH issues: (1) update procedure ambiguous status field handling - may silently drop or bypass domain validation [S5]. (2) Score tier thresholds inconsistent - domain LeadScore uses 80/50 but router stats query uses 70/40 [S6]. (3) sortBy accepts arbitrary strings with no enum validation - Prisma orderBy injection risk [S7]. (4) leadListResponseSchema expects 'data' key but router returns 'leads' [W4]. (5) leadResponseSchema missing Lead 360 fields (aiInsight, activities, notes, files, tasks) [D5]. Fix: Explicitly handle status in update, unify thresholds, add sortBy enum, fix schema keys.

tasks.title: Contact Router Security — Tenant Isolation Fixes. CRITICAL: (1) search procedure has no createTenantWhereClause — cross-tenant search by name/email (R-02). (2) logActivity transaction uses raw ctx.prisma with no tenantId in WHERE — cross-tenant update (R-03). (3) bulkEmail/bulkExport no tenant filter — email exfiltration via guessed UUIDs (R-04). (4) stats ignores typedCtx tenant — no tenantId boundary (R-05). (5) getById/getByEmail double-fetch through unscoped domain repo (R-06). Cross-ref: R-01 (prismaWithTenant raw) is cross-cutting and shared with IFC-237. Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §15.

tasks.title: Account Backend Tenant Isolation & Security. (1) CRITICAL: filterOptions uses raw ctx.prisma instead of prismaWithTenant for user lookup — tenant data leak (B-01, account.router.ts:445). (2) PrismaAccountRepository has NO tenantId filter on any method — single-layer defense (B-02). (3) existsByName blocks same name across all tenants — should be per-tenant (B-03). (4) sortBy parameter unsanitized — potential Prisma orderBy injection (B-04). (5) TOCTOU window in update/delete without transaction (B-05). (6) Zero audit logging on all account mutations (B-07). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md sections 11-12.

tasks.title: Deal Detail Page — Replace SAMPLE_DEAL with Real API Data. CRITICAL: Entire deal detail page (deals/[id]/page.tsx 792 lines) is 100% hardcoded with SAMPLE_DEAL constant (lines 116-150) — zero API calls. The dealId from useParams() is captured but never used for data fetch (line 684). Must: (1) Replace SAMPLE_DEAL with trpc.opportunity.getById query using dealId param. (2) Add useRequireAuth() guard (F-03 — detail page is the only unguarded page). (3) Fix STAGES constant to match domain 7-stage enum (F-04 — uses CLOSED instead of CLOSED_WON/CLOSED_LOST, omits NEEDS_ANALYSIS). (4) Fix StageProgress to use deal prop instead of SAMPLE_DEAL.value directly (F-05). (5) Remove _SAMPLE_ACTIVITIES dead code (F-06). (6) Add clickable links to account/contact detail pages (F-07). (7) Wire real owner data from getById relation include. Router getById exists (IFC-186). Cross-entity patterns from Lead 360 wiring (2026-03-04) should be followed. Audit: docs/audit/deal-detail-wiring-audit.md section 1.
